title: DAC Forms Legal Advisory Council: S Basavaraj & Anik M Iktear Uddin To Lead As Lifetime Fellows
description: Senior Advocate S. Basavaraj and Advocate Anik M Iktear Uddin (also known as Advocate Anik) lead the council. Justice MN Venkatachaliah (former Chief Justice of India) is the Chief Patron, and Justice Krishna Bhat (retired Karnataka High Court Judge) is the Co-Patron.
